calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re: PLAINTIFFs DREW ALLEN, and JACQUELYNN ALLEN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two.

No appearances made in this matter. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Case transferred to Stanislaus County.

Judge Pro Tem: Matthew Kahn; Clerks: M. Macadangdang, V. Da Fonseca; not reported. (525/JPT)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Continued To Aug-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Kevin Y. Jacobson, Esq., Tel. 310.933.4271, appearing for the plaintiffs;
Oliver R. Smith, Esq., Tel. 415.362.2580, appearing for American Honda Motor Co., Inc.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT DJM AUTOMOTIVE LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

Discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court notes that the matter was not contested and adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Grant as unopposed.

A single order granting both the motion and joinder is signed by the Court and filed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Dep. Calhoun. Not reported. (302/CK)

Notice Of Joinder And Joinder In Defendant Djm Automotive Llc'S Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Kevin Y. Jacobson, Esq., Tel. 310.933.4271, appearing for the plaintiffs;
Oliver R. Smith, Esq., Tel. 415.362.2580, appearing for American Honda Motor Co., Inc.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.'s Joinder In Defendant DJM Automotive LLC'S Motion To Transfer Venue.

Discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court notes that the matter was not contested and adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Grant as unopposed.

A single order granting both the motion and joinder is signed by the Court and filed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Dep. Calhoun. Not reported. (302/CK)

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar May-17-2024 Continued To Jun-07-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances :
Atty. CHRIS GRIGRORYAN, Esq. of Quill & Arrow, LLP (tel: 661-435-5050) for Plaintiff (via Zoom videoconference).
Atty. JAD DOUDAR, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (tel: 415-362-2580) for Defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT DJM AUTOMOTIVE LLC's MOTION TO TRANSFER.

Matter discussed. Counsel Grigoryan informs the Court there is a dismissal as to the moving party DJM Automotive LLC. The Court states there must be a joinder to this motion, as there is a dismissal as to the moving party. The Court continues the matter to June 7, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. to allow defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc. to file a joinder.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)
